name: Cate's Guacamole-Tomato Cup Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Bottled wax pepper, chopped very fine
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 6
1. Fry 4 slices of bacon until crispy, drain on paper towel, then crumble the bacon.
2. Remove tomato navels, core tomatoes, scoop out inside centers and chop finely.
3. Sprinkle chopped tomatoes with 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
4. Turn tomatoes upside down on paper towels to drain, then place in refrigerator and chill.
5. Add onion, diced green chilies, lemon juice, and remaining salt to the chopped tomato mixture. Mix and chill.
6. When serving, mash avocado mixture and stir into tomato mixture. Do not allow to stand, or avocados will darken.
7. Place tomatoes on bed of lettuce. Fill tomatoes with guacamole and top with crumbled bacon.
8. Serve immediately.
